# E-Commerce Fraud Prevention: The Shortcomings of Chargeback Insurance

# E-Commerce Fraud Prevention: The Shortcomings of Chargeback Insurance

![pettern](data:image/svg+xml,%3Csvg%20xmlns='http://www.w3.org/2000/svg'%20viewBox='0%200%20684%20460'%3E%3C/svg%3E)

Fraudsters are constantly ready to outmaneuver the actions online merchants take to protect and streamline the user journey—and complex, sophisticated methods of attack require a trust and safety solution that helps you proactively stop chargebacks, retain control, and grow your business.

Read this new brief to find out:

*   Insights from Sift’s in-house fraud experts
*   Key business considerations for online merchants
*   Side-by-side comparisons between fraud insurance providers and real-time machine learning solutions

### Download the Ebook

Get the Ebook

## Dare to grow differently.

Flip the switch on fraud-fueled fear. Make risk work for your business and scale securely into new markets with Sift’s AI-powered platform.
